0.text: Fibrotic retraction with associated cicatricial bronchiectasis and calcifications in apical and anterior segments of right upper lobe

1.text: Minimal fibrotic changes in medial segment of right middle lobe

2.text: Atelectatic changes in medial segment of right middle lobe

3.text: Minimal fibrotic changes in inferior lingular segment of left lung

4.text: Atelectatic changes in inferior lingular segment of left lung

5.text: Calcific nodules measuring 2.6 mm in anterior segment of left upper lobe

6.text: Calcific nodules in basal part of right middle lobe

7.text: Calcific nodules in superior segment of right lower lobe
